text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since forming my contract with Mejiro Palmer.
Another round of tryout races has come about, but as for Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff... Geh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haaa! No good this time, either. Sorry! And after all that training, too.
choice_data_list:
Having trouble running like you did in the
freestyle races?

Having trouble running like you did in the
freestyle races?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you got me there. Dang. Well, I think that during the freestyle
races I was able to let go of my thoughts and just run. But now that I'm
back here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is the prestigious Tracen Academy. And I'm a Mejiro. I think... I
can't help but get stuck on these things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's certainly not easy to rid oneself of thoughts and habits ingrained
from an early age.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, just watch me. I'm a Mejiro too, after all. I'm gonna show
everyone today that I'm worthy of bearing the name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her cheerful demeanor, she seems to be a very serious and
responsible person at heart. As a result of that...
choice_data_list:
(That's surely the Mejiro in her coming to
surface.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Ah, this sucks. Really don't want to trauma dump on my new trainer
and all that, though. What can I even—hm?)

Waaaaah! It's so, SO over! Is my rizz not up to royal levels?! I'm
low-key at my limit here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Umm... You okay? Seems like... you're going through it? Anything
you'd like to talk to someone about?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You get me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! That track's got hands! Throat's totally shot! Get up there,
Palmster, you're next!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, what about it being "so over"?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I kinda spilled the tea for ya already! It's good vibes only
from here on out! Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh yo, I saw this on Umasta earlier! Sheeeesh, that's cute! I'm basically in love with this color! Copped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pft, hahaha! That didn't take much!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh yooo, this hits DIFF. Burg is life, woo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Gosh, Helios, you can get a kick out of anything, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If it looks like it kicks, it probably slaps, no cap! I'm always out here
operatin' on the most bussin' vibes!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's the only way to do it, yeah? Fun things are bussin'! Bussin'
things are mad vibes. Mad vibes are pretty fire if you ask me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, okay. I can get down with that! I guess it really is that simple!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Simple or shrimple, you get me! It's best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Haha. "Slaps." "Fire." "Bussin' vibes"... She's got a way with words.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Phew... Okay, might be time to wrap it up. Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Oh hey, it's a scrimmage. And Helios is running in it.)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Ahahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wa-wa-wa-wa-waheeey! Zoooomin' on up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Seriously? That girl can laugh even during a race?)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahahahaha! Ahaaa! Lesgolesgolesgolesgooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (That's... Amazing. Helios is so... amazing.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(What the heck. I'm not even the one running, but my heart's beating
as if I were. It's almost deafening.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Palmster! Wait, you were watchin' me? I'm seriously gagged! Love
ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you bet I was! That was an amazing race! And also like, you
gotta tell me one thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What's going through your mind when you're racing?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Huh, when I'm racing? Well, you know...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Raisin' the roof, bringin' down the house, all while having a blast!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: All there is to it, no cap! Whyzzat?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nah, no reason! No reason, really!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's simple. And that's best!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Simple makes its comeback! You get me, girlboss. That gets you a
wooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Ahahahaha!
